regional_alignment: Hampden County Mesh is locally focused while aligning with the existing BDL / Windsor Locks regional mapping area where appropriate.

local_broker.notes: Local MQTT broker infrastructure exists for testing and future observer, bridge, and analytics work. Public live reporting is not automated yet.

systems.name: Website
systems.notes: GitHub Pages website is online. Site content is maintained manually.

systems.name: MeshCore-Hub
systems.notes: Linux-based hub used for logging, local services, documentation, MQTT testing, and future automation. Public status is not automatically monitored.

systems.name: Hampden Room Observer
systems.notes: Heltec V3 observer used for MeshCore monitoring, logging, MQTT testing, and future public status reporting. Public status is not automatically monitored.

systems.name: HampdenCountyTreeNode
systems.notes: Outdoor solar repeater documented by the project. Public status is not automatically monitored.

systems.name: Local MQTT Services
systems.notes: Local MQTT infrastructure is being tested. It should not be treated as public live network status.

systems.name: Public Live Data
systems.notes: Public live statistics are planned, but the website does not currently provide automated live node, observer, MQTT, or coverage status.

systems.name: County Network
systems.notes: Additional nodes, observers, repeaters, coverage tests, and community-hosted infrastructure are still being developed.

active_projects: Local MQTT and future bridge planning
notes: Hampden County Mesh has documented project infrastructure, but public live data, automated status reporting, and broader coverage views are still being built.
public_notice: Status information is manually maintained for now. Public live statistics are planned but not yet automated. Do not treat this page as a real-time network monitor.
